prereq.p: Your local my-learnings folder must be open in VS Code.

step.cmd: In VS Code, open the terminal via TerminalNew Terminal.
Confirm that the terminal prompt shows your my-learnings folder path.
Type the following command and press Enter:

info.note: Think of git clone as an automated download button. It copies the entire course folder from the internet into your local my-learnings folder.

step.cmd: Wait for the download to complete. A new subfolder will appear in the VS Code Explorer panel.

result.p: The practice files are now available on your computer inside my-learnings.
